mod-actionbutton-min-width.description: Used by `.spectrum-ActionButton`. Defaults to `calc(var(--mod-actionbutton-edge-to-visual-only, var(--spectrum-actionbutton-sized-edge-to-visual-only)) * 2 + var(--spectrum-actionbutton-icon-size))`, if not set.

mod-actionbutton-animation-duration.description: Used by `.spectrum-ActionButton`, `.spectrum-ActionButton:after`. Defaults to `var(--spectrum-animation-duration-100)`, if not set.

mod-actionbutton-focus-indicator-border-.description: Used by `.spectrum-ActionButton:after`. Defaults to `calc(var(--spectrum-actionbutton-border-radius) + var(--spectrum-actionbutton-focus-indicator-gap))`, if not set.
